# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] Uses fake/sample data only.
- [ ] Adds no real community records, member data, cultural material, voting data, or sensitive information.
- [ ] Does not claim or imply a real community decision or mandate.
- [ ] Keeps community authority separate from code maintainership.
- [ ] Updates docs/data/manifest/package index where relevant.
- [ ] Checks mobile layout when UI changed.
- [ ] Includes QA notes or screenshots when frontend behavior changed.

## Testing

Describe what was checked.
